name: Goat Grunt
description: Basic melee foot soldier. The most common enemy across all circles.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon standing in A-pose, muscular hunched posture, dark brown fur, curved ram horns, clawed hands gripping a rusty short sword, tattered leather loincloth, glowing amber eyes, digitigrade goat legs with cloven hooves, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Bipedal humanoid goat demon warrior, muscular, dark brown fur, ram horns, rusty short sword, tattered leather, cloven hooves, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Dark brown coarse fur, scarred leather armor, rusty iron blade, amber glowing eyes, pale horn keratin
